microsoft_ft: Owned the **end-to-end roadmap** for Azure's recovery validation program, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first **proactive resilience testing** capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+** enterprise contract with full schedule and scope accountability.

Unblocked engineering teams by anticipating bottlenecks, managing risk, and clearing logistical hurdles across cross-functional stakeholders — mirroring the program manager role of **keeping execution on schedule**.
Scaled team leverage via an **AI-driven planning agent**, restructuring autonomy workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Delivered data-driven **status updates and risk assessments** to executive leadership on every drill cycle, including post-execution debriefs that informed architectural decisions and future roadmap prioritization.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows across Azure, conducting demos and training that drove utilization across 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, identifying critical feature gaps and influencing prioritization trade-offs with engineering leadership.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting average lookup time by **83%** across service teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch time by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams with competing roadmap priorities.

Built a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, running discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and mapping a roadmap to automate critical execution paths.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and allocate resources to the highest-impact support needs.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and sequencing risk-mitigated rollout phases.

Facilitated **Agile sprint ceremonies** — planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — resolving 40+ high-priority tickets to stabilize the developer intake process and keep the migration on schedule.
Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release risk.

Produced clear **data-driven status reports** for engineering leadership on migration progress, surfacing blockers early and enabling rapid prioritization trade-offs to protect the deployment timeline.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM workflow.
Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that had gone undetected across multiple service lines.

tailoring_notes: 'End-to-end roadmap' (JD: 'Own the end-to-end scope, schedule, budget') woven into microsoft_ft bullet#1 to directly mirror the Autonomy Roadmap responsibility.
'Unblocked engineering teams / anticipating bottlenecks' (JD: 'Unblock the Engineering Team — anticipate bottlenecks') placed explicitly in microsoft_ft bullet#5 to match that JD section verbatim.

'Data-driven status updates and risk assessments / executive debriefs' (JD: 'Report to Leadership — data-driven status updates, risk assessments, flight-test debriefs') surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet#7 and amazon_robotics bullet#4.
'Prioritization trade-offs' (JD: 'make prioritization trade-offs') used in microsoft_2023 bullet#2 to connect user-research-driven roadmap shaping to Anduril's PM expectation.

'Zero operational downtime / dependency mapping' (JD: 'Lead T&E Strategy — test environments, dependencies') framed in amazon_robotics bullet#1 to echo the execution-rigor and sequencing themes of the Mission Autonomy PM role.
